title: BitPixel
description: 8x Vanilla Resource Pack, including models and redstone display
body:
Expressing sufficient visual information on such a cramped canvas, all textures have been specially drawn and not scaled using the original textures.

Balancing:
Architectural players (the double slabs of stone bricks and brick blocks have added additional appearances, making the types of blocks provided in the material pack exceed those in the original version);

Redstone player (with built-in Redstone display function, including Redstone line energy, hopper direction, dispenser status, cauldron content, etc.).

At the same time, due to the reduction of pixels, it may have a certain effect on improving frame rates (only for cases where frames are also dropped using the original resource package, there is a slight improvement).

The block icons of MC have delicate diagonal lines, which are not coordinated with the pixel jagged edges of the item icons. Therefore, I also adjusted the model details of all the blocks and items, and now they can be perfectly placed together.
